summary: Completed testing of push notification backend APIs, PWA manifest endpoint, mobile UI fixes, and admin PWA icon upload for iteration 97. All 8 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified: Push Notification toggle in Profile page, LOT Size card with mobile inline icon, Dream button inside Projected Exit card, Merin mobile section with proper hidden class logic, PWA App Icon upload section in Admin Settings branding tab.
critical_code_review_comments: Push notification endpoints correctly implemented: GET /api/users/vapid-public-key (no auth), POST/DELETE /api/users/push-subscribe (auth required), POST /api/admin/push-notify-all (admin only)
Dynamic manifest.json at /api/settings/manifest.json returns proper PWA manifest with custom icon support
ProfilePage has PushNotificationToggle component with usePushNotifications hook for subscribe/unsubscribe
TradeMonitorPage mobile UI: LOT Size card has inline Calculator icon (sm:hidden), Dream button inside Projected Exit card
Merin mobile section correctly hides when showMerinIframe is true via conditional class: ${showMerinIframe ? 'hidden' : ''}
AdminSettingsPage branding tab has PWA App Icon upload section with file input and upload-pwa-icon endpoint integration
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 97 verified push notification system and mobile UI fixes. Backend endpoints: /api/users/vapid-public-key (no auth), /api/users/push-subscribe (POST/DELETE with auth), /api/admin/push-notify-all (admin only), /api/settings/manifest.json (dynamic PWA manifest), /api/settings/upload-pwa-icon (admin file upload). Frontend: PushNotificationToggle in ProfilePage uses usePushNotifications hook. TradeMonitorPage has mobile-specific icons (sm:hidden) for LOT Size and Projected Exit cards. Merin section hides when iframe is displayed.

verified_features.details: Returns VAPID public key without authentication. Key starts with 'B' as expected for valid VAPID keys.
Saves push subscription with endpoint and keys. Requires authentication. Upserts by endpoint to avoid duplicates.
Sends push notification to all subscribed devices. Admin only. Returns sent/failed counts.
Returns dynamic PWA manifest with custom icon if configured, otherwise default icons. No auth required.
Endpoint exists and requires file upload. Returns 422 when no file provided (expected behavior).
PushNotificationToggle component found with data-testid='push-notification-toggle'. Shows subscription status and allows enable/disable.

verified_features.feature: Trade Monitor mobile LOT Size inline icon
verified_features.details: LOT Size card has Calculator icon with sm:hidden class (visible on mobile only).

verified_features.feature: Trade Monitor Dream button in Projected Exit
verified_features.details: Dream button with data-testid='open-dream-profit' found inside projected-exit-card.

verified_features.feature: Merin iframe hides Open button on mobile
verified_features.details: Code verified: merin-mobile-section has conditional 'hidden' class when showMerinIframe is true.

verified_features.feature: Admin Settings PWA App Icon upload
verified_features.details: PWA App Icon section in branding tab with file upload input (data-testid='pwa-icon-upload-input') and 'Upload PWA Icon' button.
